name: Shalford Beavers
description:
Beaver Scouts are young people aged between 6 and 8 years old.

Master new skills, have fun, make friends and help other people on your doorstep and beyond.

We meet: Monday 5.45pm-6.45pm

For more information or to join our waiting list please use the link:
https://shalfordscouts.org.uk/Join/
